_meta.title: Multiline FACE text editor (ui-textarea) — TKT-0041 resolution
_meta.ruling: New sibling primitive ui-textarea (UIFormElement), NOT a ui-text-field mode. See ADR-0134.
_meta.note: Two planes derived independently: OUTSIDE-IN = the COMPOSE axis (component -> parts/seams); INSIDE-OUT = the REALIZE axis (the semantic + interaction obligations). Crossed in `hosts`. Not a `plan` manifest — this is the design decomposition that feeds ADR-0134 + the build slicing, not the leaf-accept build card.

nodes.label: control-managed validity message node (aria-describedby target, hidden until user-invalid)
host frame — the GROWABLE box: min-block-size from `rows`, real block padding, align-items:start, overflow-y:auto, resize:vertical
value<->surface sync seam — caret-guarded model->surface effect + surface->model input listener + IME composition guard
FACE form seam — formValue / formValidity / formReset / formStateRestore on UIFormElement
user-invalid timing controller (trackUserInvalid) — gates danger treatment to first blur/change
field-labelling seam — applyFieldLabelling: aria-labelledby / aria-describedby against ui-field parts (ADR-0051 part-role override)

actions.label: enter multi-line prose (free text, newlines permitted)
insert a newline on Enter (NOT commit — the inversion of ui-text-field's Enter-commits law)
commit the value on blur-with-change — emit `change` (the entry-list commit-on-change timing the consumer depends on)
edit safely under IME composition (suppress sync mid-composition)
contribute the value to the owning form (setFormValue)
validate — required/valueMissing — and expose the verdict
reset to the initial-attribute default value on form reset
restore the value after navigation/autofill (state restore)
carry an accessible name + description + error via the ui-field seam
surface the user-invalid danger treatment only after the first blur/change
size to `rows` as a MIN height, then grow-to-content or scroll past it (multiline geometry)
let the user resize the box vertically (native <textarea> parity)
honour disabled / readonly on the editable surface
reflect a programmatic value write back to the surface (caret-guarded, reset/restore path)
render the validity message text as the non-colour cue (WCAG 1.4.1)

edges.why: the sync seam wires the editor's input/blur/composition listeners — the editor part must be created first
formValue reads the editor's textContent — the editor part is the value source
applyFieldLabelling id-references the editor directly (the ADR-0051 part-role override) — the editor must exist to receive aria-labelledby/describedby
the growable host frame lays out the editor cell (align-items:start, min-block-size) — the editor is the content it sizes around
